title: Wild Bloom Study
description: Layered botanical print with ink wash, salt texture, and wild garden movement. The organic interplay of pigment and mineral creates a one-of-a-kind depth that changes with the light.
artistNote: This piece started as a single brushstroke and grew into an entire garden.

title: Salt Meadow
description: Soft meadow forms, mineral blooms, and delicate paper texture for calm rooms. Salt crystals pull color away to reveal gentle, cloud-like negative space.
artistNote: The salt does most of the work here — I just set the stage.

title: Garden Vine
description: Linear vine movement and warm botanical tones, strong as a pair or hallway piece. The flowing line work grounds the looser washes into something architectural.
artistNote: I painted this thinking about the wisteria overtaking our back fence.

title: Quiet Bird
description: A small wildlife study with emotional presence and a quiet interior mood. Ink outlines dissolve at the edges, letting the bird emerge from soft washes of color.
artistNote: There's something about catching a bird in stillness that feels like a gift.

title: Fox Presence
description: Signed wildlife edition for collectors who want personality, story, and scarcity. Each print is hand-signed, numbered, and includes a certificate of authenticity.
artistNote: He sat at the edge of the yard one morning and just watched me paint. I returned the favor.

title: Pollinator Gift Set
description: Small botanical studies bundled for Mother's Day, garden friends, and thank-you gifts. Each set arrives wrapped and ready to give.
artistNote: These started as sketches from our pollinator garden — the bees approve.
